name: Earn-A-Bike
description: Learn bicycle repair skills and earn your own bike through a structured 6-session program.
details: Learn wheel truing, brake adjustment, and drivetrain repair
Graduate with a refurbished bicycle you built yourself
eligibility: Open to all community members. Priority given to those without reliable transportation.

name: Open Shop
description: Access our full workshop with professional tools. Volunteers on hand to help.
details: Full access to Park Tool professional stands and tools
Bring any bike for repair or maintenance
eligibility: Open to everyone. Membership not required.

name: Safety Education
description: Road safety, hand signals, and riding confidence for all ages.
details: Road safety and traffic law basics
Hand signals and group riding etiquette
Basic maintenance checks before every ride
Free helmets and lights for participants
Classes for kids, teens, and adults
schedule: Monthly classes, check events for dates
eligibility: All ages welcome. Youth under 12 must have guardian present.

name: Youth Programs
description: Building confidence, skills, and community for young riders ages 8-16.
schedule: Summer camps in July. After-school programs during school year.
eligibility: Ages 8-16. Scholarships available for all programs.
